headline: Aramex Lanka (Pvt) Ltd wins Best Global Freight and Logistics Provider
standfirst: Aramex Lanka (Pvt) Ltd is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Global Freight and Logistics Provider, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Aramex Lanka (Pvt) Ltd and the award record

Aramex Lanka (Pvt) Ltd is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Global Freight and Logistics Provider. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Aramex Lanka (Pvt) Ltd, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Aramex official office locator lists Aramex Lanka offices, and the EDB profile identifies courier services and freight forwarding. The GBE archive records the logistics award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Global Freight and Logistics Provider record matters

The Best Global Freight and Logistics Provider recognition places Aramex Lanka (Pvt) Ltd in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
